title: qrafty's Jungle Villages
description: This pack adds random generating jungle villages in the game to honor the forgotten minecraft jungle villagers! 🌹
body:
# Villages in the Jungle! 🌱🌹
This pack adds villages and more structures to the jungle biome, as there is already a vanilla texture for these villagers. 🌴

![JUNGLE VILLAGES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qSvzu3X3/images/b76e08da2da1a4bdc27b432a5c1e50b0be2e2709.png)

**Including:** 25+ custom buildt structures generating random with each other. 

![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a250108b13f3501a4d957024dd1abe6d2312a7c.png)
## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)

### You want to support me? Consider leaving a tip at my [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/qrafty) 😊

**This pack is part of my main datapack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)!**
